meaning: 托木斯克[西西伯利亚东南部城市]
examples: The plane, which flew from Tomsk to Surgut, had 37 people onboard.
The damaged AN-24 plane, owned by the Angara Airlines, is seen after a hard landing on the surface of the Ob river in Tomsk region in western Siberia July 11, 2011.
In 1994 a study found that 55% of the heat produced in Tomsk was wasted.
On January 25th, the ministry held hearings in Seversk which one bus-load of Tomsk citizens was allowed to attend.
He is lobbying for public hearings to be held in Tomsk itself.
